name: thank-you-for-my-service
description: Mat Best's 'Thank You for My Service' — a brutally honest, darkly hilarious memoir from a former Army Ranger about service, combat, PTSD, brotherhood, and coming home.
useCase: Understand military service from a Ranger's perspective, cope with PTSD and transition, and find humor and hope in veteran experiences.
knownRisks: Contains profanity, dark humor, and graphic descriptions of combat — not for all readers
One veteran's perspective — not representative of all military experiences
Humor may be offensive to those who prefer a more reverent tone about military service
